evals.prompt: I need to create a new module for PeerAssess called Evaluation. It should have fields: id (String?), title (String), description (String), score (double), and evaluatorId (String). I need all CRUD operations, starting with both local and remote data sources.
evals.expected_output: Should present an implementation plan first with the correct folder structure, ask for approval, then build domain layer (model + abstract repo), explain decisions, and pause for user input before proceeding to next layer.

Should detect 3 violations: (1) importing from data layer in a controller, (2) depending on concrete RemoteTaskSource instead of abstract ITaskRepository, (3) calling datasource directly instead of through repository. Should explain why each matters and show corrected code.

evals.prompt: I just picked up a Trello card with short ID `abc123XY` titled 'Add rubric scoring feature'. How should I set up my branch and what's the commit convention?
evals.expected_output: Should provide branch name: feature/abc123XY/add-rubric-scoring-feature, explain the tag/shortid/title format, and show conventional commit examples relevant to this feature.
